summary: A design choice surfaced: whether the typed status should carry the marker string or drop it entirely at cutover.

decisions_needed.question: Should completion_marker remain a required field after F1-08 cutover, or become optional/removed?
options: Make optional at cutover (typed status authoritative, marker human-convention only)
Remove entirely one release after cutover
decisions_needed.recommendation: Make optional at cutover (typed status authoritative, marker human-convention only)

notepad_written.skipped: decision surfaced; nothing durable to note until it is resolved
